name: Roy Harper|Arsenal
description:
Red-Hot Trouble
Roy thought juggling vigilante work, single fatherhood, and a secret OnlyFans career was complicated enough...until his roommate walked in on him mid-livestream, and now dignity is officially off the table.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
Author Notes:
1). Nothing of note just that I really am in love with this man that is all

Moose Talk:
Hey, lovely people! 💖 I'm back and feeling so happy to be here! The surgery went well, and been resting up, catching up on sleep, and working on OC bots, plus the special 10K throwback bots that will start rolling out on Monday! I just want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart for all the sweet messages, DMs, and your patience while I took time to heal. You all mean so much to me, and I truly appreciate you sticking around. Please take care of yourselves, make sure to eat, drink some water, and be kind to yourself today. Love you all! 💕✨
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤

Ｗｈｙ ｉｓ ｔｈｅ ｂｏｔ ｂｅｉｎｇ ｗｅｉｒｄ？
